purpose.zh: 年度总结、项目复盘、数据驱动工作汇报。
purpose.en: Annual summaries, project reviews, and data-driven work reports.

style.zh: Google 品牌色、清晰网格、KPI 卡片和简洁图表。
style.en: Google brand colors, clean grids, KPI cards, and concise charts.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
